text: Digital risks for your financial stability. [Knowledge article](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/cybersecurity/actueel.html). [Cybersecurity](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/cybersecurity/veilig/index.html). 11/17/2025 • 2 minutes reading. ABN AMRO Editorial.

metadata.source_title: Digital risks for your financial stability

text: Cyber hygiene is indispensable for financial stability. It is not only about technical solutions such as passwords and firewalls, but also about good governance. Anyone who does not have their digital foundation in order endangers business operations, reputation and financial health. The European NIS2 directive makes digital security a task for the board.

metadata.source_title: Digital risks for your financial stability

text:
It's about more than IT: business continuity, risks and integrity are at stake. A cyber incident can halt production, lose customers and lead to legal claims. Good governance also means taking responsibility for digital security. Cybersecurity is also a financial issue. Cyber security has direct consequences for financial reporting and corporate position:
Accountants test continuity in the annual accounts. Without demonstrable safety, comments or limitations arise in the audit report.

metadata.source_title: Digital risks for your financial stability

text: Customers and partners are increasingly demanding digital security in contracts. Anyone who cannot provide proof of a safely operating organization runs the risk of losing orders.

metadata.source_title: Digital risks for your financial stability

text: The chain clauses from NIS2 make this even more urgent.

metadata.source_title: Digital risks for your financial stability

text: The basics are in order with demonstrable cyber hygiene. A good digital foundation starts with structural measures that you can also demonstrate. The NIS2 Quality Mark is a quality mark that proves that your company meets security standards.

metadata.source_title: Digital risks for your financial stability

text: Independent control ensures trust among customers and partners. Protect your future. Cyber security is more than technology. It protects your data, your reputation and your financial stability. Organizations that invest in digital security not only protect their data, but also their reputation, their customers and their future.

metadata.source_title: Digital risks for your financial stability

text: This article was produced in collaboration with [Samen Digitaal Veilig](https://www.samendigitaalveilig.nl/).

text:
Take cyber measures yourself or report fraud? About 1 in 5 entrepreneurs is confronted with cybercrime. Such a cyber incident can have major consequences for business operations, customers, suppliers or reputation. Taking appropriate measures is therefore important for every company.
